description: You are a Detective investigating a corporate espionage case involving two suspects. To maintain a strict evidentiary chain of custody, establish a 'Persons and Hosts' hierarchy in Autopsy to segregate the evidence. Create a forensic case named 'Custodian_Tracking_2024' (case number 'INV-CUS-009') in /home/ga/Cases/. Add the data source /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd, assigning it to a new Person named 'Alice_Chen' and a new Host named 'Alice_USB'. Add the data source /home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd, assigning it to a new Person named 'Bob_Smith' and a new Host named 'Bob_Camera'. Generate a CSV manifest at /home/ga/Reports/custodian_manifest.csv with the header 'PERSON,HOST,DATA_SOURCE' mapping each custodian to their respective host and data source. Write a brief narrative summary to /home/ga/Reports/custodian_summary.txt explaining the logical segregation of evidence.
